changes.detail: --font-display and --font-serif repointed from Inter (identical to body font) to Source Serif 4, at all 3 definition sites (noetfield-tokens.css, noetfield-shell.css fallback block, noetfield-v20-tier1.css override).
changes.verified: computed getComputedStyle(h1).fontFamily === 'Source Serif 4, ui-serif, Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif' on / and /partners/, confirmed via Playwright, not source-reading alone.
grep confirmed every pill/circle element (badges, avatars, FAB) uses hardcoded 999px/50%, not these tokens -- no visual family inconsistency introduced.

changes.detail: Floating chat FAB was overlapping the sticky bottom CTA bar on / at mobile widths. Fixed with a :has(.nf-sticky-mobile-cta)-scoped, higher-specificity rule.
changes.verified: computed bottom offset 84px on / at 390px viewport (was 14px before fix attempt 2); 14px unchanged on /partners/ (no bar present) -- confirms scoping is correct, not a blanket override.

changes.detail: noetfield-chat.css?v=7->v=8, noetfield-chat.js?v=7->v=8, matching this repo's existing cache-bust convention.
changes.verified: grep confirmed no other file references the old v=7 URLs.

changes.detail: Google Fonts request changed from 3 discrete static weights (500;600;700) to a true variable range (500..700), matching how Inter is already requested in the same URL.
changes.verified: URL resolves 200; matches existing Inter request pattern in the same <link>.

verification.first_pass_blocking_finding: Mobile FAB fix was inert on all viewports <=480px due to a pre-existing, later-in-source-order @media (max-width: 480px) rule of equal specificity re-declaring the same property. Would have shipped as 'fixed' while remaining broken on every real phone.
first_pass_should_fix_findings: chat CSS/JS not cache-bust-bumped despite editing chat CSS
font-weight:650 silently snapping to 700 due to discrete (not ranged) Google Fonts weight request
verification.corrective_action: All three findings fixed in the same commit; blocking fix independently re-verified via computed-style inspection (ground truth, not visual screenshot impression) before commit.

known_deferred_items.item: serif over-applied to some small incidental text (pricing numerals in .nf-offer-card .price, .nf-pack-card__price; .nf-wwu-fit-section h3) via the shared --font-serif token, which is consumed by ~20 selectors across 9 files this pass did not individually audit
known_deferred_items.recommendation: spot-check on next iteration; not blocking for this scope (headline-level display typography)

known_deferred_items.item: homepage hero density (3 pricing cards + full interactive governance playground above the fold) and duplicated 'Board PDF' CTA block (home vs /partners/, verbatim copy+layout)
known_deferred_items.recommendation: flagged in original screenshot review as requiring layout/content restructuring, not a token-level fix -- intentionally out of scope for this pass
